title: Drops into Shulker
description: Collected drops go into an offhand shulker box
body: # Drops Into Shulker ![Preview Video](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/1bacon/drops-into-shulker/master/assets/preview.gif) Drops-Into-Shulker makes collected drops go into a shulker if it's in the offhand. \ It follows all "normal" item rules. (Stack limits, Shulker stacking, etc...) COMPATIBLE WITH MODDED SHULKERS , like [Reinforced Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/reinforced-shulker-boxes), etc. \ Thanks to [Meshiest](https://github.com/Meshiest) If the Shulker inventory is full or the item cannot go into a shulker, it will be picked up as normal.\ Filtering pick-ups can be easily done by filling the shulker with empty stacks (1 item in each slot), just like the normal inventory. If you encounter an issue please post it on the [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/1bacon/drops-into-shulker/issues).
